subject: Gaming
title: Gaming's Billion-Dollar Future
description: A quick, practical guide to Gaming's Billion-Dollar Future.

hook.text: Gaming is a $200 billion industry—larger than movies, music, and sports combined.

buildup.text: Three billion people play games worldwide. Gaming is no longer niche—it's mainstream entertainment.

discovery.text: AI is creating NPCs that learn, generating content, and building entire game worlds from text prompts.

twist.text: Crunch culture, loot boxes, and market consolidation threaten the industry's long-term health.

climax.text: Microsoft's $69 billion Activision deal was the largest gaming acquisition ever—signaling consolidation.

punchline.text: Bigger than movies, music, and sports. Gaming won.

quiz.question: How big is the global gaming industry?
options: $200 billion—larger than movies, music, and sports combined
$50 billion—about the size of the music industry
